name_en: M82072 Embossed Black (〽️Grade A Full Steel Version〽️) Personalized Custom! Changeable Chip! Multiple Wallet, This Multiple wallet is made from full-grain Taurillon leather, featuring a Monogram floral pattern and LV logo embossed on the calfskin, showcasing an exquisite and elegant style. This practical wallet easily fits into most pockets and features ample card slots, a bill compartment, and pockets for neatly storing your essentials. 11.5 x 9 x 1.5 cm
